result:
I’d choose to make it so every person had secure access to the basics: enough food, clean water, shelter, healthcare, education, and safety.

A lot of the world’s worst suffering grows out of not having those foundations. If everyone started from a place of basic security, people would have more freedom to grow, create, cooperate, and solve bigger problems together.

It wouldn’t make the world perfect—people would still disagree, struggle, and make mistakes—but it would make the world far less cruel.

What about you?
prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
